title: ulex australis var. welwitschianus
intro: Ulex australis var. welwitschianus, also known as the prickly gorse, is a variety of the Ulex australis shrub, native to the Mediterranean region. It is a spiny, evergreen shrub with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and relieve respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Ulex australis var. welwitschianus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
